entries.title: a16z crypto raises $2.2 billion for fifth fund, promotes CTO to general partner
entries.snippet: a16z crypto has raised $2.2 billion for its fifth fund as it points to growing use of stablecoins, onchain finance, and improving regulation.
entries.tweet_text: a16z crypto raises $2.2 billion for fifth fund, promotes CTO to general partner

entries.title: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack
entries.snippet: Bullish agreed to acquire Equiniti in a $4.2 billion deal combining its tokenization stack with the global transfer agent’s infrastructure.
entries.tweet_text: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack

entries.title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
entries.snippet: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.

entries.title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants
entries.snippet: With $114 trillion in custodied liquid assets, Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation looks to position tokenization as future of existing financial system.
entries.tweet_text: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants

entries.title: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group
entries.snippet: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) has announced the launch timescale for its tokenization solution, with limited live transactions from July 2026 and a launch in October. The systemically important market infrastructure received a no action letter from the SEC in December 2025 allow
entries.tweet_text: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group

entries.title: Banks Stay Tight-Lipped as Senators Reveal Proposed Clarity Act Stablecoin Deal
entries.snippet: Senators unveiled a Clarity Act compromise on the subject of stablecoin rewards. Crypto seems happy enough, but what about the banks?

entries.title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
entries.snippet: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.
entries.tweet_text: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard

entries.title: Crypto VC Haun Ventures raises $1 billion for funds investing in blockchain and AI
entries.snippet: Last year, Haun Ventures was reportedly seeking to raise $1 billion to launch two new crypto-focused funds.
entries.tweet_text: Crypto VC Haun Ventures raises $1 billion for funds investing in blockchain and AI

entries.title: DTC to begin tokenized asset rollout in July ahead of full launch as it gets feedback from BlackRock, Circle and others
entries.snippet: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation will roll out its tokenization service as it gathers feedback from firms like BlackRock to Circle.
entries.tweet_text: DTC to begin tokenized asset rollout in July ahead of full launch as it gets feedback from BlackRock, @circle and others

entries.title: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody
entries.snippet: Securitize is the first firm to receive FINRA approval to custody tokenized securities and underwrite onchain IPOs and secondary offerings.
entries.tweet_text: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody

entries.title: Stablecoin startup Rain joins Mastercard as a Principal Member
entries.snippet: Rain, which was valued at $1.95 billion during a Series C round announced in January, has an existing relationship with card issuer Visa.
entries.tweet_text: Stablecoin startup Rain joins @Mastercard as a Principal Member

entries.title: Brazil Outlaws Crypto Remittances From FX Companies
entries.snippet: Brazil has forbidden electronic foreign exchange (eFX) companies from using cryptocurrencies to settle overseas remittances. That’s according to a new resolution from the country’s central bank, published last week and flagged Sunday (May 3) in a report by CoinDesk. Under the new rules, set to go in

entries.title: New York AG settles for $5 million with Uphold in first enforcement action against a crypto yield product promoter
entries.snippet: The settlement is the first New York enforcement action to target a platform that promoted someone else's crypto yield product rather than its own issuer.

entries.title: BlackRock urges OCC to drop tokenized reserve cap idea, expand eligible assets in GENIUS Act comment letter
entries.snippet: The world's largest asset manager opposed a potential 20% cap on tokenized reserve assets, a constraint that would limit products like its BUIDL fund.

entries.title: Hong Kong advances licensed stablecoins with launch of AI-powered anti-fraud platform

entries.title: Crypto Biz: Capital has no consensus
entries.snippet: Crypto markets splinter as miners pivot to AI, BitMine doubles down on ETH, stablecoin liquidity idles, and tokenized Treasurys reshape trading collateral.

entries.title: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire
entries.snippet: Fun powers deposits, withdrawals, and settlement flows for some of crypto’s leading apps, including Polymarket, Lighter, and Aave.
entries.tweet_text: Crypto onramping solution Fun raises $72 million Series A co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire

entries.title: Tether Reports Billion-Dollar Q1 Profit Amid Crypto Slump—And Says Audit Has Begun
entries.snippet: Stablecoin giant Tether says it holds over $141 billion in U.S. Treasuries, a figure that has never been verified by a full audit.

entries.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments firm Distributed Technologies Research
entries.snippet: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.

entries.title: Tokenized RWA market grows 420% since 2025 on regulatory clarity, access
entries.snippet: Tokenized US Treasurys were one of the biggest growth areas of the RWA market, rising from a market capitalization of $3.9 billion at the start of 2025 to more than $15 billion.
entries.tweet_text: Tokenized RWA market grows 420% since 2025 on regulatory clarity, access

entries.title: Malaysian sovereign fund pilots tokenized sukuk with $25m issuance
entries.snippet: Khazanah, Malaysia’s sovereign wealth fund, has issued a RM100 million ($25m) tokenized sukuk in collaboration with the Securities Commission Malaysia. entries.title: Agora Seeks US Bank Charter to Scale Digital Dollars
entries.snippet: Stablecoin issuer Agora Finance has filed for a national trust bank charter as it looks to build its business in the United States. entries.title: M0 and Anchorage Digital Team to Support Stablecoin Builders
entries.snippet: Cryptocurrency firm Anchorage Digital has launched a partnership with stablecoin infrastructure company M0. The collaboration is designed to merge M0’s infrastructure capabilities with Anchorage’s regulated issuance experience to serve a “growing universe of stablecoin builders,” the companies said

entries.title: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules
entries.snippet: The FCA signs off rules to let UK funds keep registers onchain and add a new Direct‑to‑Fund dealing model, aiming to simplify tokenized funds inside the existing regime.
entries.tweet_text: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules

entries.title: US gov't sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts
entries.snippet: The US CFTC has sued four states for trying to enforce state-level gambling laws on prediction markets, meanwhile Strategy stacked over 56,000 BTC.

entries.title: THORWallet partners with Unblock to expand global non-custodial Mastercard access
entries.snippet: THORWallet has partnered with Swiss-regulated provider Unblock to expand global access to non-custodial Mastercard solutions, advancing self-custodial finance adoption.

entries.title: Solana ecosystem expands institutional push with Europe-focused research arm
entries.snippet: Solana is launching a Swiss-based research institute and practitioner guide to help European financial institutions evaluate its blockchain as regulatory clarity and onchain usage grow.

entries.title: Kast hires former SEC official Stephanie Allen to lead policy communications
entries.snippet: Stablecoin payments company Kast hired former SEC adviser Stephanie Allen as it expands licensing, communications and policy efforts after an $80 million raise.

entries.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Banned From Crypto Industry in $10 Million FTC Settlement
entries.snippet: The settlement represents a massive reduction from an initial $4.7 billion judgment against the Celsius founder.

entries.title: Kustodia launches smart contract escrow for LATAM's $600m fraud crisis
entries.snippet: Mexico's first peso-denominated blockchain escrow goes live on SPEI for high-value P2P transactions.

entries.title: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street
entries.snippet: The BlackRock-backed firm was recently selected as by the New York Stock Exchange as a tokenization specialist.

entries.title: MoonPay acquires crypto key manager Sodot, launches institutional business led by former CFTC acting chair
entries.snippet: Former acting CFTC Chair Caroline Pham will lead MoonPay's new division focused on banks, asset managers, and trading firms.

entries.title: Solana Ventures leads $18 million round in Squads to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude
entries.snippet: Squads, known for its Solana-based multisig protocol, has raised $18 million in new funding to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude.

entries.title: Visa Adds 5 Blockchains as Stablecoin Settlement Volume Surges
entries.snippet: Visa is adding five more blockchains to its global stablecoin settlement pilot, bringing the total number of blockchains it supports to nine. entries.tweet_text: @Visa Adds 5 Blockchains as Stablecoin Settlement Volume Surges

entries.title: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses
entries.snippet: “We want to be the default for 'money at rest' within the onchain space,” WisdomTree Head of Digital Assets Will Peck said.

entries.title: 'DeFi bent, not broken': Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won't derail path to $2T RWA market
entries.snippet: The bank said DeFi’s $300 million-plus rescue effort and structural upgrades reinforce its long-term $2 trillion real-world asset thesis.

entries.title: Hong Kong warns of fake tokens posing as HSBC's stablecoin
entries.snippet: HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial both clarified that they have not launched any stablecoins in Hong Kong, but plan to do so this year.

entries.title: Canaan, Tether deepen partnership on immersion-cooled mining systems
entries.snippet: Canaan secures a new Tether order for modular mining hardware as the stablecoin issuer expands into integrated, data center-style Bitcoin infrastructure.

entries.title: RWA yield platform Nuva, co-incubated by Animoca, raises $5.2 million in seed funding
entries.snippet: Nuva is a marketplace for tokenized real-world assets that aims to help users earn yield by connecting issuers and users directly.

entries.title: Singapore revisits bank prudential restrictions on permissionless blockchains
entries.snippet: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) has launched a new consultation on prudential rules for banks and cryptoassets, particularly around the use of permissionless blockchains for tokenized assets and stablecoins. The latest iteration provides lighter touch alternatives to crypto rules proposed
entries.tweet_text: Singapore revisits bank prudential restrictions on permissionless blockchains

entries.title: Visa taps former Tether CEO's WeFi to connect crypto to its payment network
entries.snippet: The collaboration adds to a rapidly growing list of initiatives between existing payment networks and digital asset firms.

entries.title: State Street to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by year's end
entries.snippet: State Street said it plans to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by the end of 2026, as firms predict a tokenization boom.
entries.tweet_text: @StateStreet to launch tokenized fund servicing from Luxembourg by year's end

entries.title: Stablecoin payroll firm Toku taps Paxos Labs' Amplify to offer yield on paychecks
entries.snippet: Toku has integrated Paxos Labs’ Amplify platform, enabling employees to earn yield on their pay “the moment it lands.”
